OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on FEB-27-2013:
Plaintiff NASIR PATEL is present and appearing in propria persona
Defendant JENNIFER MICHELE PORTENEUVE is present with Attorney Brian E. Barner representing the defendant though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem Olan Lambert, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case does not settle. The trial date of MAR-04-2013 remains on calendar.
